texto: I am saving my love in four parts. One part I will give to my family, because they give life to me. One part I will give to my future husband, because he will be the one who I will accompany with me for the rest of the life. The third part I will give to my husband's family, because if it was not for his mother and father I would not have him. The fourth part I give to myself, because if a woman does not love herself, how she could love another?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Paul Brinkley-Rogers que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “I am saving my love in four parts. One part I will give to my family, because they give life to m…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, love, love-quotes, com foco em love-quotes.
